segments.text: In the Lord I take refuge.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: How then can you say to me:
Flee like a bird to your mountain.
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: For look, the wicked bend their bows; they set their arrows against the strings to shoot from the shadows at the upright in heart.
When the foundations are being destroyed, what can the righteous do?
segments.speaker: Unknown

segments.text: The Lord is in his holy temple; the Lord is on his heavenly throne.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: He observes everyone on earth; his eyes examine them.
The Lord examines the righteous, but the wicked, those who love violence, he hates with a passion.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: On the wicked he will rain fiery coals and burning sulfur; a scorching wind will be their lot.
segments.speaker: The Lord

segments.text: For the Lord is righteous, he loves justice; the upright will see his face.
